$comment: Per-protocol detail data: governance, audits, incidents. Prototype populates aave, lido, uniswap fully; remaining protocols show the page structure with curation-pending states (full population is M1 work, SAT-298). Provenance tags: 'public-docs' = stated in protocol's public documentation, pending onchain verification; 'onchain-verifiable' = directly checkable onchain.

governance.label: Governance system
governance.value: Aave Governance v3 — onchain voting by AAVE/stkAAVE/aAAVE holders across voting networks

governance.label: Execution
governance.value: Payloads executed via PayloadsController with timelocked executors per network

governance.label: Emergency powers
governance.value: Community Guardian multisig with constrained pause powers, ratified by governance

incidents.description: Protocol paused on several markets after a vulnerability report; no user funds lost; fixed via governance
CRV liquidation left ~$1.6M bad debt on v2 after large borrower position unwound; covered via treasury process

governance.label: Governance system
governance.value: Lido DAO via Aragon, LDO token voting; Dual Governance adds stETH-holder dynamic timelock as a check on DAO decisions

governance.label: Node operators
governance.value: Curated operator set plus permissionless modules (Simple DVT, CSM)

incidents.description: One of nine oracle committee keys compromised (Chorus One); quorum design contained impact, no user funds lost; key rotated
Launchnodes operator validators slashed (~20 validators); losses compensated to stakers per DAO process

governance.label: Governance system
governance.value: UNI token voting via Governor Bravo with timelock; governance controls treasury and fee switch, not pool logic

governance.label: Upgradeability
governance.value: v3 and v4 core contracts are non-upgradeable (immutable once deployed); v4 hooks are pool-creator-chosen, not protocol-controlled

governance.label: Frontend/protocol separation
governance.value: Uniswap Labs interface is distinct from the onchain protocol; UniswapX uses signed intents settled by fillers

incidents.description: Phishing campaign targeted LP NFT holders (~$8M user losses); not a protocol contract flaw
